passives.name: First Light
passives.effects: Gain {{as|2% heal and shield power|hsp}} and {{as|10 ability power}} for every additional {{as|100% '''base''' mana regeneration}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain {{as 2% heal and shield power hsp}} and {{as 10 ability power}} for every additional {{as 100% '''base''' mana regeneration}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Bonuses scale with additional (bonus) mana regeneration expressed as percent of base.
Dawncore is modeled as an enchanter amplifier that converts mana-regeneration investment into both heal/shield amplification and ability power.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
